rationale: The pair has an exact DOI match, and the two papers are tightly aligned on the same core problem (misresponse to reversed Likert items) and mechanisms. The citing note explicitly says it extends prior reverse-worded-item work by separating reversal/negation/polar-opposite effects and mapping them to inattention vs difficulty, while the cited paper is a direct source that tests those mechanisms (inattention, acquiescence, item verification difficulty). This is likely substantive (theory/mechanism foundation), not an incidental mention.
